title: Volila Heavy Base Shot Glasses - 25ml (6 Pack) Coloured Set for Alcohol, Vodka, Expresso, Tequila & Desserts - Durable & Reusable for Home, Bars & Party
features: 🥃【 Elegant Design 】Raise your spirits with our classic shooter glasses, designed to never go out of style. With a sleek and stylish design, our shot glasses add a touch of sophistication to any occasion. Whether you're hosting a party or enjoying a quiet night in, these glasses make a statement.

💎【 Quality Craftsmanship 】 Meticulously crafted, our set of 6 crystal shot glass is the perfect balance of form and function. This essential addition to your barware collection boasts dimensions of 6cm height, 3.5cm top diameter, and a 3cm base. Crafted with precision from soda-lime glass, these shot glasses 25ml offer a delightful drinking experience.

🎁【 Gift of Distinction 】 Impress friends and loved ones with a gift that stands the test of time. Our classic coloured glass shot glasses make a thoughtful and stylish present for any occasion – birthdays, celebrations, or just because you want to show someone you care. These glasses are not just practical; they’re a statement piece that will stand the test of time, making them a perfect addition to anyone’s barware collection.

🌐【 Versatile Vibes 】Whether you're lounging at home, hitting up the local bar, or throwing an outdoor bash, these versatile shot glasses fit right in. Their classic design effortlessly transcends boundaries, enhancing any drinking experience and adding a touch of elegance wherever they go. So go ahead, take them anywhere and everywhere – they’re built to impress in any setting.

🌟【 Warranty 】 At volila, your satisfaction is our priority. Every purchase of our shots glasses comes with a 100% warranty. Should you encounter any concerns or issues with your item, don't hesitate to reach out to us. Your peace of mind is our promise!
description: Product Description Previous page Pick a Set Volila’s collection of shot glasses feature a fun mix of colours and sizes, fit for any occasion. Fit for Any Occasion From casual gatherings to upscale soirées, our shot glasses complement any setting and occasion. Made with High Quality Soda-lime Glass Our durable shot glasses offer a 25ml or 50ml capacity for a delightful drinking experience. The Perfect Present Our shot glasses are a thoughtful present for any celebration or simply to show appreciation. Sleek & Sturdy Thanks to the slightly conical shape, our crystal clear glasses fit perfectly in the hand. Next page 1 Six Variations 2 Elegant & Versatile 3 Premium Quality 4 Excellent Gifts 5 Solid Design Product Dimensions Customer Reviews Eye-Catching Shot Glasses “The colour is what makes them stand out. Its heavy base makes it sturdy & good to hold. They are made of durable food grade glass.” - amitjajoo Fantastic, Quality Glassware “These shot glasses are top-notch in quality. Couldn't find any flaws upon inspection, and the variety of colours adds to their attractiveness“ - Ash Crafted for Various Beverages “They are good for alcohol, matcha shots and ginger shots etc and mini jellies, mini mousse and other mini desserts. I recommend them” - Clawmaw Versatile & Decorative “Excellent quality, simple and elegant design, versatile and decorative, resonably priced, so definitely a good buy!“ - Sylwia S DURABLE GLASS Our durable shot glass combines robust construction with timeless design, ensuring a reliable and stylish companion for countless toasts. DISHWASHER SAFE Our dishwasher-safe shot glasses offer effortless cleaning, making it the perfect hassle-free companion for your spirited moments. FREEZER SAFE Chill and thrill with our freezer-safe shot glasses, designed to enhance your drinking experience with the an icy touch for your favourite spirits. INDIVIDUALLY BUBBLE-WRAPPED Our shot glasses arrive individually bubble-wrapped, ensuring both the safety of your purchase and the pristine allure of each elegant glass. Can these be used for hot contents like espresso? While these shot glasses are designed to withstand the heat of espresso shots, we advise against pouring boiling liquids, as the potential thermal shock could lead to breakage. Are the shot glasses dishwasher safe? Yes, our shot glasses are dishwasher safe. They are made of a durable material that can handle dishwasher cleaning without any issues. What are the top and bottom diameter for these shot glasses? For our 50ml shot glasses, the top diameter is 4cm and the bottom diameter is 3.5cm. While the 25ml shot glasses have a top diameter of 3.5cm and a bottom diameter of 3cm. Can these shot glasses be etched for customised presents? Regrettably, we do not personalize shot glasses are not part of our offerings. However, we continuously explore new options and appreciate your interest in our products.
